title: The Devil, Probably
tmdbOverview: Charles drifts through politics, religion and psychoanalysis, rejecting them all. Once he realises the depth of his disgust with the moral and physical decline of the society he lives in, he decides that suicide is the only option...
synopsis: The Devil, Probably (1977) is a drama film from France. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 1970s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 14+ certification (IT rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
